---
title: "`r if (is.null(params$report_title) || identical(params$report_title, '')) 'Experimental Analysis Report' else params$report_title`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
  word_document:
    toc: true
params:
  report_title: "Experimental Analysis Report"
  design_name: NULL
  alpha: NULL
  comparison_method: NULL
  descriptive_stats: NULL
  summary_stats: NULL
  anova_table: NULL
  key_statistics: NULL
  mean_table: NULL
  posthoc_summary: NULL
  posthoc_table: NULL
  dataset_preview: NULL
  inference_text: NULL
  report_note: NULL
  plot_errorbar: NULL
  extra_tables: NULL
  extra_text_sections: NULL
  extra_plots: NULL
  generated_at: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

`%||%` <- function(x, y) {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || identical(x, "")) y else x
}

has_rows <- function(x) {
  is.data.frame(x) && nrow(x) > 0
}

render_table <- function(x, caption, fallback = "No data available for this section.") {
  if (has_rows(x)) {
    print(knitr::kable(
      x,
      caption = caption,
      booktabs = knitr::is_latex_output(),
      longtable = knitr::is_latex_output()
    ))
  } else {
    cat(fallback)
  }
}

render_text_block <- function(x, fallback = "No text was supplied for this section.") {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) {
    cat(fallback)
  } else {
    cat("\n\n```text\n")
    cat(paste(as.character(x), collapse = "\n"))
    cat("\n```\n")
  }
}
```

# Report Overview

`r params$report_note %||% 'This report summarizes the latest analysis generated from the Shiny app.'`

```{r overview}
overview <- data.frame(
  Item = c("Design", "Significance level", "Post-hoc comparison", "Generated at"),
  Value = c(
    params$design_name %||% "NA",
    if (is.null(params$alpha)) "NA" else params$alpha,
    params$comparison_method %||% "NA",
    params$generated_at %||% format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z")
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(knitr::kable(overview, caption = "Analysis Metadata", booktabs = knitr::is_latex_output()))
```

# Dataset Preview

```{r dataset-preview}
render_table(
  params$dataset_preview,
  "Input Data Preview",
  "No input preview was supplied from the app."
)
```

# Treatment Summary

```{r treatment-summary}
render_table(
  params$summary_stats,
  "Treatment Summary",
  "No treatment summary was supplied."
)
```

# ANOVA Summary

```{r anova-table}
render_table(
  params$anova_table,
  "ANOVA Table",
  "No ANOVA table was supplied."
)
```

# Key Statistics

```{r key-statistics}
render_table(
  params$key_statistics,
  "Key Statistics",
  "No key statistics were supplied."
)
```

# Means and Post-hoc Comparison

```{r means-table}
render_table(
  params$mean_table,
  "Treatment Means",
  "No treatment mean table was supplied."
)
```

```{r posthoc-summary}
render_table(
  params$posthoc_summary,
  "Post-hoc Summary",
  "No post-hoc summary table was supplied."
)
```

```{r posthoc-groups}
render_table(
  params$posthoc_table,
  "Post-hoc Grouping",
  "No post-hoc grouping table was supplied."
)
```

# Interpretation

`r params$inference_text %||% 'No inference text was supplied.'`

# Plot

```{r report-plot, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
if (inherits(params$plot_errorbar, "ggplot")) {
  print(params$plot_errorbar)
} else {
  cat("No ggplot object was supplied from the app.")
}
```

```{r extra-tables, results='asis'}
if (is.list(params$extra_tables) && length(params$extra_tables) > 0) {
  for (section_name in names(params$extra_tables)) {
    cat("\n\n# ", section_name, "\n\n", sep = "")
    render_table(params$extra_tables[[section_name]], section_name)
  }
}
```

```{r extra-text-sections, results='asis'}
if (is.list(params$extra_text_sections) && length(params$extra_text_sections) > 0) {
  for (section_name in names(params$extra_text_sections)) {
    cat("\n\n# ", section_name, "\n\n", sep = "")
    render_text_block(params$extra_text_sections[[section_name]])
  }
}
```

```{r extra-plots, fig.width=8, fig.height=5, results='asis'}
if (is.list(params$extra_plots) && length(params$extra_plots) > 0) {
  for (plot_name in names(params$extra_plots)) {
    cat("\n\n# ", plot_name, "\n\n", sep = "")
    plot_obj <- params$extra_plots[[plot_name]]
    if (inherits(plot_obj, "ggplot")) {
      print(plot_obj)
    } else {
      cat("No ggplot object was supplied for this section.")
    }
  }
}
```
